economic_notes: First Nation located on North Channel on Manitoulin Island. Has interests in Great Lakes Hospitality Group Limited Partnership (hotel in Little Current), Mnidoo Mnising Power Limited Partnership (16.665%), UCCM Building Material Supply Company Ltd. (16-2/3%), Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth L.P. (0.5024%), and OFN Asset Management GP Corp. COVID-19 declared pandemic in March 2020 with unknown full impact on First Nation.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Segmented revenue detail shows ISC funding of $1,578,800 plus ISC Health $159,066 totalling $1,737,866. Total government transfers estimated from segmented schedule: ISC $1,737,866 + Kinoomaadziwin Education Body $2,235,213 + CMHC $81,343 + Ministry of Community and Social Services $558,848 + Ministry of Education $554,589 + Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership $762,408 = $5,930,267 less OFNLP which may be investment income not government transfer; adjusted total_government_transfers set to ISC + Kinoomaadziwin + CMHC + MCSS + MOE = $5,167,859 plus OFNLP distributions $762,408 treated as investment. Four non-controlled entities accounted for by modified equity method: Great Lakes Hospitality Group LP, UCCM Building Material Supply Co., Mnidoo Mnising Power LP, Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP/OFN Asset Management GP Corp. No schedule of remuneration included in the document. COVID-19 note disclosed with unknown financial impact. Economic dependence on ISC funding disclosed.
